title: Marshmallow Tart
excerpt: MARSHMALLOW TART Ingredients 1 Can Condensed Milk 65 ml Lemon Juice 12 Cherries cut in half 375 g Marshmallows cut smaller 250 ml Orley Whip 5 ml Vanilla Essence 125 ml Crushed Pineapple 1 x Box Nuttikrust Biscuits 90 ml Butter melted 1 packet small marshmallows for decorating on top (pink and white) …
html:
MARSHMALLOW TART

Ingredients

  • 1 Can Condensed Milk
  • 65 ml Lemon Juice
  • 12 Cherries cut in half
  • 375 g Marshmallows cut smaller
  • 250 ml Orley Whip
  • 5 ml Vanilla Essence
  • 125 ml Crushed Pineapple
  • 1 x Box Nuttikrust Biscuits
  • 90 ml Butter melted
  • 1 packet small marshmallows for decorating on top (pink and white)

 

Method

  1. Crush the Nutticrust and mix it with the melted butter. Press it into a greased tart dish to form the crust.
  2. Whisk the condensed milk and lemon juice until thick
  3. Stir in the cherries, and then the marshmallows that have been cut into pieces.
  4. Whip the cream and vanilla essence until stiff.
  5. Add it to the first mixture and then the pineapple.
  6. Pour the mixture over the crust in the tart dish.
  7. Place in the fridge.
  8. Decorate with pieces of marshmallows.
